_note: Source layout for the Worcester Big Y store. Perimeter departments + 18 numbered center aisles, captured from the user. The seed asset (with UUIDs + item_locations) is generated from this during implementation — see tasks/active--worcester-big-y-store.md. `number` mirrors the oxford-62 convention: digit strings for numbered aisles, '<X> Dept' for perimeter departments. `sort_order` is a sensible default shopping path the user can reorder later via drag-and-drop.

aisles.label: Produce
aisles.categories: Fresh fruits, vegetables, and organic selections

aisles.label: Floral
aisles.categories: Cut flowers, bouquets, plants (front entrance)

aisles.label: Bakery
aisles.categories: Fresh baked breads, pastries, and custom cakes

aisles.label: Natural & Living Well
aisles.categories: Gluten-free items, organic snacks, and plant-based alternatives

aisles.label: Deli & Kitchen
aisles.categories: Sliced meats, cheeses, prepared hot foods, sub shop, and the pizza shop

aisles.label: Seafood
aisles.categories: Fresh catch, shellfish, and the hot fish & chips counter

aisles.label: Meat & Butcher Shop
aisles.categories: Fresh cuts, poultry, and Big Y Angus beef

aisles.label: Health & Beauty
aisles.categories: Shampoos, body washes, first aid, vitamins, pain relief

aisles.label: Breakfast & Cereal
aisles.categories: Cold cereals, oatmeal, granola bars, pancake mixes, syrup

aisles.label: Coffee, Tea & Baking
aisles.categories: Coffee pods, coffee beans, tea, flour, sugar, spices, baking oil

aisles.label: Canned Goods & Soups
aisles.categories: Canned vegetables, beans, broths, Progresso/Campbell soups

aisles.label: Pasta & Grains
aisles.categories: Dry pasta, pasta sauces, rice, quinoa, mac & cheese

aisles.label: International Foods
aisles.categories: Hispanic/Latino, Asian, and European import sections

aisles.label: Condiments & Dressings
aisles.categories: Ketchup, mustard, mayo, pickles, olives, salad dressings

aisles.label: Bread & Spreads
aisles.categories: Sandwich breads, wraps, peanut butter, jelly, honey

aisles.label: Snacks & Crackers
aisles.categories: Boxed crackers, Cheez-Its, popcorn, nuts, pretzels

aisles.label: Chips & Cookies
aisles.categories: Potato chips, tortilla chips, salsas, cookies, sweet snacks

aisles.label: Soda & Sparkling Water
aisles.categories: Coca-Cola/Pepsi products, seltzers, ginger ale, tonic

aisles.label: Juice & Sports Drinks
aisles.categories: Juice boxes, Gatorade, energy drinks, multipack iced teas

aisles.label: Water & Bulk Beverages
aisles.categories: Gallon jugs, 24-packs of spring water, enhanced waters

aisles.label: Frozen Foods (Aisle A)
aisles.categories: Frozen pizzas, ice cream, frozen novelties, waffles

aisles.label: Frozen Foods (Aisle B)
aisles.categories: Frozen TV dinners, frozen vegetables, frozen meats

aisles.label: Paper Goods & Plastic
aisles.categories: Toilet paper, paper towels, napkins, trash bags, foil

aisles.label: Laundry & Cleaning
aisles.categories: Detergents, fabric softeners, dish soap, surface sprays

aisles.label: Baby & Pet Care
aisles.categories: Diapers, baby food, wipes, dog/cat food, pet treats

aisles.label: Dairy
aisles.categories: Milk, eggs, butter, yogurt, packaged cheese (back left & left perimeter)

aisles.label: Pharmacy
aisles.categories: Prescriptions and pharmacist consults (front left)

aisles.label: Checkout
aisles.categories: Candy, magazines, gift cards, reusable bags, batteries
